suite.name: Api Tests

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=health_diary, url=http://127.0.0.1:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: GET /api/users Returns 200

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/users path_url=/api/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/users status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '183', 'ETag': 'W/"b7-J7qadnQgyGKMCphiPcKSXs6TdgU"', 'Date': 'Sat, 18 Apr 2026 12:30:05 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[{"id":1,"username":"johndoe","email":"johndoe@example.com"},{"id":2,"username":"janedoe","email":"janedoe@example.com"},{"id":3,"username":"bobsmith","email":"bobsmith@example.com"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Verify that the users endpoint returns HTTP 200

test.name: GET /api/items Returns 200

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/items path_url=/api/items headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/items status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '50', 'ETag': 'W/"32-jIU6dVlFy+Qxv4tuYNUnug0aWkQ"', 'Date': 'Sat, 18 Apr 2026 12:30:05 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[{"id":1,"name":"Apple"},{"id":2,"name":"Banana"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Verify that the items endpoint returns HTTP 200

test.name: POST /api/auth/login Returns 200 With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "johndoe", "password": "password1"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

test.doc: Verify that login returns HTTP 200 with valid credentials

test.name: POST /api/auth/login Returns 401 With Invalid Credentials

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '52', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "johndoe", "password": "wrongpassword"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Verify that login returns HTTP 401 with wrong credentials

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects

suite.doc: Health Diary API Test Suite Tests the REST API endpoints of the Health Diary back-end.

suite.name: Entry Tests

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=health_diary, url=http://127.0.0.1:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: Kirjautuminen onnistuu ja palauttaa tokenin

kw.name: Login And Get Token
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "johndoe", "password": "password1"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Log in with given credentials and return the JWT token

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

test.doc: Varmista, että kirjautuminen palauttaa JWT-tokenin, jota käytetään suojattujen reittien kutsuihin.

test.name: Uusi päiväkirjamerkintä luodaan onnistuneesti

kw.name: Login And Get Token
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "johndoe", "password": "password1"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Log in with given credentials and return the JWT token

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/entries path_url=/api/entries headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOjEsInVzZXJuYW1lIjoiam9obmRvZSIsImVtYWlsIjoiam9obmRvZUBleGFtcGxlLmNvbSIsImlhdCI6MTc3NjUxNTQwNSwiZXhwIjoxNzc2NjAxODA1fQ.CUky5hTh_JP_nbxT-z0wi4kdS1-keGxg7vJT8OtOM-Y', 'Content-Length': '134', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"entry_date": "2026-04-05", "mood": "Hyv\\u00e4", "weight": 72.5, "sleep_hours": 8, "notes": "Testiautomaatiolla luotu merkint\\u00e4"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

test.doc: Kirjaudu sisään, luo uusi diary entry POST /api/entries -kutsulla ja varmista, että vastaus sisältää luodun merkinnän tiedot.

test.name: Merkinnät haetaan kirjautuneena käyttäjänä

kw.name: Login And Get Token
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "johndoe", "password": "password1"}'

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Log in with given credentials and return the JWT token

kw.name: Authenticated GET
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/entries path_url=/api/entries headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOjEsInVzZXJuYW1lIjoiam9obmRvZSIsImVtYWlsIjoiam9obmRvZUBleGFtcGxlLmNvbSIsImlhdCI6MTc3NjUxNTQwNSwiZXhwIjoxNzc2NjAxODA1fQ.CUky5hTh_JP_nbxT-z0wi4kdS1-keGxg7vJT8OtOM-Y'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/entries status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '679', 'ETag': 'W/"2a7-89CgVifJYsj52w0IFc0bEiLY4uA"', 'Date': 'Sat, 18 Apr 2026 12:30:05 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[{"entry_id":1,"userId":1,"entry_date":"2024-02-01","mood":"Happy","weight":70.5,"sleep_hours":8,"notes":"Felt great today!"},{"entry_id":2,"userId":1,"entry_date":"2024-02-02","mood":"Tired","weight":70.2,"sleep_hours":5,"notes":"Did not sleep well."},{"entry_id":5,"userId":1,"entry_date":"2026-04-05","mood":"Hyvä","weight":72.5,"sleep_hours":8,"notes":"Testiautomaatiolla luotu merkintä"},{"entry_id":6,"userId":1,"entry_date":"2026-04-05","mood":"Hyvä","weight":72.5,"sleep_hours":8,"notes":"Testiautomaatiolla luotu merkintä"},{"entry_id":7,"userId":1,"entry_date":"2026-04-05","mood":"Hyvä","weight":72.5,"sleep_hours":8,"notes":"Testiautomaatiolla luotu merkintä"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Perform a GET request with a Bearer token

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

test.doc: Varmista, että GET /api/entries palauttaa kirjautuneen käyttäjän merkinnät.

test.name: Merkinnän luominen ilman tokenia palauttaa 401

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/entries path_url=/api/entries headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '111', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"entry_date": "2026-04-05", "mood": "Testi", "weight": 70, "sleep_hours": 7, "notes": "Ei tokenilla yritetty"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Varmista, että uuden merkinnän luominen ilman autentikointia epäonnistuu.

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects

suite.doc:
Tehtävä 4: Uuden päiväkirjamerkinnän luontitesti Testaa diary entry -luomista REST API:n kautta kirjautumisen jälkeen.
HUOM: Ennen testien ajamista käynnistä: 1. Back-end: node server.js (port 3000)

suite.name: Login Crypto Tests

test.name: Kirjautuminen onnistuu kryptatuilla tunnuksilla

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\Bashar\\OneDrive - Metropolia Ammattikorkeakoulu Oy\\Desktop\\WebDevCourse\\my-vite-app\\outputs\\browser\\traces\\temp\\845304eb-f9d0-46e7-bf6c-7ff1c8e3ba11"}

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"C:\\Users\\Bashar\\OneDrive - Metropolia Ammattikorkeakoulu Oy\\Desktop\\WebDevCourse\\my-vite-app\\outputs\\browser\\traces\\temp\\845304eb-f9d0-46e7-bf6c-7ff1c8e3ba11"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:5173/src/auth/login.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text '***' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text '***' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

test.doc: Kirjaudu CryptoLibraryllä kryptatuilla tunnuksilla. CryptoLibrary purkaa automaattisesti johndoe ja password1 ennen testiä, koska variable_decryption=True.

test.name: Kryptattu salasana ei näy lokeissa

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:5173/src/auth/login.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text '***' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Secret
kw.doc: Types the given secret from ``variable_name`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

test.doc: Varmista kirjautuminen ja demonstroi että CryptoLibrary piilottaa salasanan lokeista (variable_decryption=True purkaa automaattisesti). Type Secret käyttää $-notaatiota, jolloin arvo maskautuu ***-merkeillä lokeissa.

suite.doc:
Tehtävä 6: Kirjautumistesti CryptoLibraryllä kryptatuilla tunnuksilla Käyttäjätunnus ja salasana on kryptattu epäsymmetrisellä EC-kryptauksella. CryptoLibrary purkaa muuttujat automaattisesti (variable_decryption=True).
HUOM: Ennen testien ajamista: 1. Aseta yksityisen avaimen salasana ympäristömuuttujaksi: PowerShell: $env:private_key_password="testkey123" 2. Avainpari sijaitsee: resources/private_key.json 3. Back-end: node server.js (port 3000) 4. Front-end: npm run dev (port 5173)
Kryptaus tehty komennolla: python -c "from CryptoLibrary.utils import CryptoUtility; ..." Julkinen avain: resources/public_key.key

suite.name: Login Env Tests

test.name: Kirjautuminen onnistuu .env-tiedoston tunnuksilla

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:5173/src/auth/login.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'johndoe' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'password1' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

test.doc: Kirjaudu sisään .env-tiedostosta python-dotenvilla ladatuilla tunnuksilla. TEST_USERNAME ja TEST_PASSWORD haetaan automaattisesti .env-tiedostosta.

test.name: Kirjautuminen epäonnistuu väärällä .env-salasanalla

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:5173/src/auth/login.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'johndoe' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'vaarasalasana123' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

test.doc: Varmista, että väärä salasana estää kirjautumisen. Käyttäjätunnus haetaan .env:stä, mutta salasana on selvästi väärä.

suite.doc:
Tehtävä 5: Kirjautumistesti .env-tiedostoon piilotettuilla tunnuksilla Käyttäjätunnus ja salasana ladataan .env-tiedostosta resources/variables.py:n kautta (python-dotenv).
HUOM: Ennen testien ajamista: 1. Tarkista, että projektin juuressa on .env-tiedosto: TEST_USERNAME=johndoe TEST_PASSWORD=password1 2. Back-end: node server.js (port 3000) 3. Front-end: npm run dev (port 5173)

suite.name: Login Tests

test.name: Onnistunut kirjautuminen ohjaa entries-sivulle

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

test.doc: Kirjaudu oikeilla tunnuksilla ja varmista, että sivu ohjautuu entries-sivulle.

test.name: Epäonnistunut kirjautuminen pysyy kirjautumissivulla

kw.name: New Browser

No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.

test.doc: Kirjaudu väärällä salasanalla ja varmista, että sivu ei ohjaudu pois.

test.name: Tyhjillä tunnuksilla ei voi kirjautua

kw.name: New Browser

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Url
kw.doc: Returns the current URL.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Varmista, että tyhjillä kentillä submit ei toimi (HTML5 required-validointi).

suite.doc:
Tehtävä 2: Kirjautumistesti Health Diary -sovellukselle Testaa kirjautumislomakkeen toimintaa Browser Libraryn avulla.
HUOM: Ennen testien ajamista käynnistä: 1. Back-end: node server.js (port 3000) 2. Front-end: npm run dev (port 5173)

suite.name: Webform Tests

test.name: Dropdown Select - Valitaan vaihtoehto listasta

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\Bashar\\OneDrive - Metropolia Ammattikorkeakoulu Oy\\Desktop\\WebDevCourse\\my-vite-app\\outputs\\browser\\traces\\temp\\4e2bd6b9-4456-45a0-a223-ea3aedd5b051"}

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"C:\\Users\\Bashar\\OneDrive - Metropolia Ammattikorkeakoulu Oy\\Desktop\\WebDevCourse\\my-vite-app\\outputs\\browser\\traces\\temp\\4e2bd6b9-4456-45a0-a223-ea3aedd5b051"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.selenium.dev/selenium/web/web-form.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) 2 by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element select[name="my-select"].
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Selected Options
kw.doc: Returns the specified attribute of selected options of the ``select`` element.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Testaa normaalia <select>-pudotusvalikkoa. Valitaan "Two" ja varmistetaan arvo.

test.name: Dropdown Datalist - Kirjoitetaan arvo datalist-kenttään

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.selenium.dev/selenium/web/web-form.html
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'New York' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Property
kw.doc: Returns the ``property`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Testaa <datalist>-pudotusvalikkoa, johon voi kirjoittaa vapaasti tai valita ehdotetuista arvoista.

test.name: Checkbox - Checked-tila vaihdetaan

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.selenium.dev/selenium/web/web-form.html
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Get Property
kw.doc: Returns the ``property`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Uncheck Checkbox
kw.doc: Unchecks the checkbox found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Property
kw.doc: Returns the ``property`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Not Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is true.

kw.name: Get Property
kw.doc: Returns the ``property`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Not Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is true.

kw.name: Check Checkbox
kw.doc: Checks the checkbox or selects radio button found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Property
kw.doc: Returns the ``property`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Testaa checkboxia: oletuksena checkbox 1 on checked ja checkbox 2 on unchecked. Poistetaan valinta checkbox 1:stä ja asetetaan checkbox 2 checked-tilaan.

test.name: Radio Button - Valitaan toinen vaihtoehto

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.selenium.dev/selenium/web/web-form.html
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Get Property
kw.doc: Returns the ``property`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Property
kw.doc: Returns the ``property`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Get Property
kw.doc: Returns the ``property`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Not Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is true.

test.doc: Testaa radio-nappeja: valitaan radio 2 ja varmistetaan, että se on valittu ja radio 1 ei ole.

test.name: File Input - Tiedostokenttä tunnistetaan

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.selenium.dev/selenium/web/web-form.html
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Get Property
kw.doc: Returns the ``property`` of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Varmistaa, että tiedostokenttä löytyy sivulta ja on vuorovaikutteinen. (Tiedoston lataus ei tehdä tässä testissä.)

test.name: Kaikkien kenttien lomake lähetetään onnistuneesti

kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.selenium.dev/selenium/web/web-form.html
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'Testi' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Secret
kw.doc: Types the given secret from ``variable_name`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'Robot Framework testi' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) 3 by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element select[name="my-select"].
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'San Francisco' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Check Checkbox
kw.doc: Checks the checkbox or selects radio button found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click With Options
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

test.doc: Täyttää kaikki testatut kentät ja klikkaa Submit – varmistaa kuittaussivun.

suite.doc: Tehtävä 3: Web form -testit Browser Libraryn avulla Testaa Selenium Web Form -esimerkkisivun kenttiä: Dropdown (select), Dropdown (datalist), File input, Checkboxit ja Radio buttonit. Testisivu: https://www.selenium.dev/selenium/web/web-form.html
